root_cause: n8n UI save during credential attach re-blanked Airtable resource-locator values; cachedResultName/Url hardening survives MCP create/update but NOT a UI save
fix: Convert the 3 Airtable-typed nodes to httpRequest (Airtable REST API, base/table in URL string). No resource-locator anywhere -> immune to builder AND UI-save blanking. Apply Rules + 7 PATCH unchanged/byte-identical.
